amendments.text: (a) Each item of equipment essential for safe operation, including radio communication and navigation equipment, must-- (1) Adequately perform its intended function; (2) In the case of equipment other than radio communications and navigation equipment, function properly when installed; (3) In the case of radio communications and navigation equipment, be installed as prescribed in Sec. 23.1431; and (4) Where appropriate, be adequately labeled as to its identification, function, and operating limitations. (b) Whenever necessary, additional equipment that is installed as prescribed in the operating rules of this chapter, must meet the requirements of this section.

[(a) Each item of installed equipment essential for safe operation must-- (1) Be of a kind and design appropriate to its intended function; (2) If appropriate, be labeled as to its identification, function, or operating limitations, or any applicable combination of these factors; (3) Be installed according to limitations prescribed for that equipment and in compliance with Sec. 23.1431; and (4) Function properly when installed.] (b) Whenever necessary, additional equipment that is installed as prescribed in the operating rules of this chapter, must meet the requirements of this section.
